description_long: This armchair features a broad, boxy silhouette with thick, straight armrests and a deep, wide seat, offering a modern and substantial presence. The upholstery is a soft, gray fabric with a subtle, woven texture that gives it a contemporary yet inviting look. The seat and backrest are both generously padded, with the backrest rising to a medium height and maintaining a flat, rectangular profile. The armrests are wide and flat, matching the overall geometric design of the chair. The chair stands on four short, tapered wooden legs with a dark finish, providing sturdy support and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall construction suggests comfort and durability, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with gray woven fabric upholstery, wide flat armrests, and short dark wooden legs. It features a deep seat and a medium-height rectangular backrest for comfort and support.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick armrests, and flat, rectangular backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the slight backward angle of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and armrests, as well as the dark wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest and the chair's overall depth.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, and fully upholstered with fabric
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, flat, rectangular, and fully upholstered
attribute_leg_type: short, tapered wooden legs with a dark finish
attribute_upholstery_pattern: subtle woven texture in solid gray
